headline: Assessing Constellation Energy (CEG) Valuation After Strong Long Term Returns And Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: How Constellation Energy’s Recent Performance Sets Up the Discussion Constellation Energy (CEG) has drawn investor attention after a mixed stretch, with the stock showing gains over the past year but declines over the past 3 months, month, and year to date. See our latest analysis for Constellation Energy. Recent trading paints a mixed picture for Constellation Energy. The 1-day share price return of 1.68% and 7-day share price return of 8.82% sit against a 30-day share price return decline...

headline: Is Constellation Energy Corporation (CEG) A Top Growth Stock in Billionaire Philippe Laffont’s Portfolio?
summary: Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) is one of the top growth stocks in billionaire Philippe Laffont’s portfolio. On April 4, analysts at Barclays reiterated Constellation Energy Corporation (NASDAQ:CEG) with an Overweight and raised the price target to $360 from $356.
